_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: francando
data.message:
feat: generating dummy srdf for robots without it
feat: renamed robot_arms into robot, moved tmr into robots
fix: updated paths for tmr
chore: changelog updated

data.author: schl_ja
data.message: Added fr3_duo srdf and enabled arm_prefixes for urdf

data.author: ignacio-franka
data.message: FIX: IMU was not included in the xacro file

data.author: winkma
data.message: feat: changed minor principal moment of inertia to satisfy triangle inequality

data.author: Majanao
data.message:
* Refactor FR3 Duo Robot Configuration

    - Removed the cover kinematics argument from fr3_duo.urdf.xacro as it is no longer needed.
    - Updated inertials.yaml for fr3_duo_cover and fr3_duo_mount to indicate that values need to be corrected.
    - Deleted the kinematics.yaml file for fr3_duo_cover since it is no longer in use.
    - Removed fr3_duo_fixed_structure.urdf.xacro as it is obsolete.
    - Adjusted kinematic parameters in fr3_duo_mount's kinematics.yaml for both left and right configurations to new values.

data.author: ssilenzi
data.message:
fix: scripts create_urdf.sh and visualize_franka.sh need the correct user id

* commit '2525a2ebf556dc8326f1479d4c47755df64db271':
  fix: correct same problem on visualize_franka.sh
  fix: script create_urdf.sh needs the correct user id

data.author: jcarpinelli-bdai
data.message: Changes XACRO arguments to parameters for simpler macro invocations

data.author: noyansahin-franka
data.message:
Remove arm_id parameter from toplevel robot xacros

arm_id was specified in the toplevel robot xacros as a left-over
from when we didn't have individual arm xacros. Now that we do,
having the arm_id parameter in the toplevel robot xacros is
redundant and can be removed.
